raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "More than 40% of Californians are seriously considering leaving the state.",
    "About 61% of Californians cite the high cost of living as the reason for their potential move.",
    "More than 40% of independents and nearly 30% of Democrats are considering a move out of California.",
    "People of color are far more likely to say that the expense of living in California is the reason they might leave.",
    "80% of California residents are dissatisfied with the cost of everyday living.",
    "70% of Californians are dissatisfied with the economy.",
    "55% of Californians are unhappy with health care and housing costs.",
    "46% of people have trouble saving money or paying for unexpected expenses, which is a six percentage point increase since April 2022.",
    "18% of Californians struggle to make ends meet every month."

}
```
